Class WelcomePage

Represents the welcome page of a wizard, typically displayed as the first step.

Inheritance
object
WelcomePage
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI.Wizard
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
[Serializable]
public sealed class WelcomePage
Remarks

The welcome page introduces the user to the purpose of the wizard. It usually provides a brief overview of the task that the wizard will perform and may include instructions or important information before the user proceeds to the next step.

Constructors

WelcomePage(string, string)

Initializes a new instance of the WelcomePage class.

Declaration
public WelcomePage(string titleText, string welcomeText)
Parameters
Type Name Description
string titleText

The title text displayed on the welcome page.
string welcomeText

The introductory text shown to the user.
Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentException

Thrown if titleText or welcomeText is null, empty, or contains only whitespace characters.

Properties

TitleText

Gets the title text displayed at the top of the welcome page.

Declaration
public string TitleText { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
string
Remarks

This text is typically displayed as the main heading of the page and briefly describes the purpose of the wizard.

WelcomeText

Gets the introductory text displayed on the welcome page.

Declaration
public string WelcomeText { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
string

A string containing the descriptive text that explains the purpose of the wizard and what the user can expect from the following steps.
Examples

For example:

This wizard will guide you through the process of configuring your new project.
